# terrible_community_ciscosmb_facts (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `gather_subset` (String) When supplied, this argument will restrict the facts collected to a given subset.  Possible values for this argument include `all`, `hardware`, `config` and `interfaces`.  Can specify a list of values to include a larger subset.  Values can also be used with an initial `!` to specify that a specific subset should not be collected.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `ansible_net_all_ipv4_addresses` (String) All IPv4 addresses configured on the device.
- `ansible_net_all_ipv6_addresses` (String) All IPv6 addresses configured on the device.
- `ansible_net_config` (String) The current active config from the device.
- `ansible_net_cpu_load` (String) Current CPU load.
- `ansible_net_gather_subset` (String) The list of fact subsets collected from the device.
- `ansible_net_hostname` (String) The configured hostname of the device.
- `ansible_net_interfaces` (String) A hash of all interfaces running on the system.
- `ansible_net_memfree_mb` (Number) The available free memory on the remote device in MiB.
- `ansible_net_memtotal_mb` (Number) The total memory on the remote device in MiB.
- `ansible_net_model` (String) The model name returned from the device.
- `ansible_net_neighbors` (String) The list of neighbors from the remote device.
- `ansible_net_serialnum` (String) The serial number of the remote device.
- `ansible_net_spacefree_mb` (String) The available disk space on the remote device in MiB.
- `ansible_net_spacetotal_mb` (String) The total disk space on the remote device in MiB.
- `ansible_net_stacked_models` (String) The model names of each device in the stack.
- `ansible_net_stacked_serialnums` (String) The serial numbers of each device in the stack.
- `ansible_net_uptime` (String) The uptime of the device.
- `ansible_net_version` (String) The operating system version running on the remote device.
- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
